name: tier-b/ruby/03-no-gemspec-paths
description: Root Gemfile without any gemspec path: lines (just normal gem dependencies). Without convention markers, single-package; no evidence emitted.

manifests.Gemfile:
source "https://rubygems.org"

gem "rails", "~> 7.1"
gem "pg", "~> 1.5"
gem "puma", "~> 6.4"

group :development, :test do
  gem "rspec-rails", "~> 6.1"
end
